crowns.ponder.compressor.text_1: Compressor increase the pressure of the incoming flow
crowns.ponder.compressor.text_2: At the difference of the turbine the increase in pressure depends on the speed
crowns.ponder.compressor.text_3:
At 0 rpm it's %s
At 64 rpm it's %s
At 128 rpm it's %s
At 256 rpm it's %s
crowns.ponder.compressor.text_4: High pressure water boil at higher temperature
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_1: Nuclear Fuel naturally produces fast neutrons
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_10: Without proper cooling or control rods, temperature reaches critical levels.
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_11: The fuel catastrophically fails and melts into corium.
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_2: Fast neutrons are unlikely to induce fission
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_3: Add a moderator to transform them into thermal neutrons which can induce fission and produce more neutrons
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_4: In short a moderator makes the reactor hotter
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_7: Gold has the opposite effect and can be used as a control rod. It blocks all radiation
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_8: When enough fuel-type blocks are in one place with a Moderator, the reaction will skyrocket
crowns.ponder.nuclear_basics.text_9: As fission continues, fuel assemblies begin to heat up...
crowns.ponder.reactor_layout.text_1: Like all hot blocks, nuclear fuel can be used to heat water.
crowns.ponder.reactor_layout.text_2: It's recommended to build reactors in a concentric circles.
crowns.ponder.reactor_layout.text_3: Heat exchanger can be placed inside
crowns.ponder.reactor_layout.text_4: Control rod can be placed beside them
crowns.ponder.reactor_layout.text_5: Wool insulate the reactor and increase the efficiency
crowns.ponder.reactor_layout.text_6: The taller the reactor the more time water has to boil; also increase the power by a small amount
crowns.ponder.turbine.text_1: Input vapor into the Steam Inputs
crowns.ponder.turbine.text_2: If the water is not hot enough the turbine will not turn
crowns.ponder.turbine.text_3: Once the water is boiling and has some vapor in it the turbine will spin
crowns.ponder.turbine.text_4: The color shows the vapor quality
death.attack.crowns.low_temperature: %s got turned into an ice cube
